tasks.label: Personal scholarship / financial-aid application (due in 3 days, ~3 focused hours: short essay + two uploads)

memory.summary: I have a free afternoon to complete the scholarship application, which offers significant financial aid and requires about three focused hours. Although attending the fun event is tempting, the application's deadline and potential value make it the priority.
Starting the scholarship application now creates a buffer for unexpected delays, reducing Thursday's stress without sacrificing future leisure time.

Despite working for an hour, the scholarship application remains mostly incomplete with only 32% progress. I still have half my free block left but need to maintain focus to finish before the deadline.

I made solid progress on the scholarship application, but missed a casual gaming opportunity. With 30% of the work remaining and two days left, I need to prioritize finishing the task over missing leisure options.
After one hour of work, the scholarship application is 55% complete with three days remaining. This progress reduces urgency, allowing me to balance the remaining effort with my current fatigue.
I've reached 64% progress on the scholarship application after two hours of work, reducing the remaining effort needed before the three-day deadline.

After another hour of work, the scholarship application is now 68% complete with three days remaining. This steady progress further reduces urgency, allowing me to manage my fatigue while maintaining momentum.
After two hours of work, the scholarship application is 76% complete with three days left. This steady progress reduces urgency, allowing me to balance remaining effort with my current fatigue.

After one hour of work, the scholarship application is 80% complete with three days remaining. This progress further reduces urgency, allowing me to balance the remaining effort with my current fatigue.
I slept only 4 hours, resulting in low energy of 4.8 despite having no sleep debt. This fatigue makes the remaining scholarship work feel more demanding than my previous progress suggested.
The scholarship application is now 98% complete after two focused hours, leaving minimal work before the three-day deadline.
The scholarship application is now fully complete, eliminating the immediate deadline pressure and allowing me to address my current low energy levels.

agent.last_reasoning: The observation confirms the application is 100% complete, so no further work is needed. I will switch to the 'fun_now' task to utilize remaining time before the deadline passes.
